records.expression: MACD(12,26,9) histogram flip + zero-line filter + ADX(14)>20 + ATR(14) anomaly filter
records.what_worked: Infrastructure works correctly - engine, data loading, visualization all function. Long trades (41.6% win rate) performed better than short (35.8%). Session filter reduced signals by ~40%.
records.what_failed: Default MACD 12/26/9 on M5 produces too many histogram flips. Stop-loss at ATR×2 triggers too frequently. Zero-line and ADX filters insufficient to screen noise.
records.key_insight: MACD histogram flip on M5 generates too many signals (~54/month) with default 12/26/9 params. ATR×2 SL is too tight for M5, causing frequent stop-outs. Need larger cooldown period and stronger trend filters.
pitfalls: M5 MACD histogram flip too noisy
ATR×2 SL too tight for XAUUSD M5 volatility
Cooldown 12 bars (1hr) insufficient to prevent overtrading
Zero-line filter alone insufficient for noise reduction
next_steps: Increase SL to ATR×3 or ATR×4
Consider using MACD crossover (MACD line crosses signal line) instead of histogram flip
Test with H1 timeframe instead of M5
